name: localstack-demo
description: LocalStack colloquium demo – notes app with S3, Lambda & API Gateway

scripts.build:lambda: cd lambda && npm install && npm run package
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd lambda && npm install && cd ../tests && npm install
scripts.clean: docker compose down -v && rm -rf lambda/dist lambda/function.zip lambda/node_modules tests/node_modules volume terraform/.terraform terraform/*.tfstate*
